enumType.description: Name of a JSON-defined enum (or full type name for code enums)

allowSetByClients.description: Indicates whether clients are allowed to set this property

serverOnly.description: When true, this property is completely hidden from clients (API responses and UI definitions). Use for sensitive data like passwords.

isMappedToDbField.description: Indicates whether the property is mapped to a database field

isUnique.description: Indicates whether the property value must be unique across all entities

isRequired.description: When true, the property is required (not nullable). Affects DB column (NOT NULL), UI validation, and backend validation.

validators.description: Array of validators to apply to this property
